Home / Vendors / Handmade Knits & Crochet
🧶
Clothing

Handmade Knits & Crochet

Warm, colourful handmade knitwear & crochet creations

📍 Cashel Market 📍 Keel Market

About Handmade Knits & Crochet

This stall brings a splash of colour and warmth to Achill Island Market. Every item is handmade with love — from cosy winter hats and scarves to beautiful crocheted blankets and practical dishcloths for the home.

The maker behind the stall has years of experience in traditional knitting and crochet techniques, creating pieces that are both functional and beautiful. The attention to detail in every stitch is what makes these items so special — they're made to last and designed to be used and enjoyed.

Perfect for gifts, holiday souvenirs, or just treating yourself to something handmade and Irish. The stall is always popular with visitors who appreciate genuine handcraft.

What You'll Find

🧢 Cosy Hats

Handknitted hats in vibrant colours — perfect for Achill's Atlantic breeze.

🛏️ Crocheted Blankets

Beautiful blankets and throws in traditional and modern patterns.

🧣 Scarves & Wraps

Warm scarves and wraps — handmade from quality yarn in gorgeous colours.

🏠 Dishcloths & Home

Practical crocheted dishcloths and home textiles — handmade and hard-wearing.
